diagrams.title: 8-Way Circle Symmetry
diagrams.description: Shows how one computed point (x,y) generates 7 other points through symmetry
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how calculating only 1/8th of circle points suffices for entire circle

diagrams.title: Midpoint Circle Algorithm - Pixel Selection
diagrams.description: Shows the decision between East and Southeast pixel choices
elements: Midpoint M between E and SE
diagrams.purpose: Understand how decision parameter determines pixel selection

diagrams.title: Circle Algorithm Flowchart
diagrams.description: Complete flowchart of midpoint circle algorithm decision process
diagrams.purpose: Understand algorithm structure and decision flow
